items.q: Name the movie that features the character Truman Burbank.
items.explanation: Truman Burbank is strongly linked to The Truman Show.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Whiplash?
items.explanation: Andrew Neiman is one of the defining characters in Whiplash.

items.q: Which movie features the character Rick Deckard?
items.explanation: Rick Deckard is associated with Blade Runner.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Michael Corleone.
items.explanation: Michael Corleone is strongly linked to The Godfather.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Pulp Fiction?
items.explanation: Jules Winnfield is one of the defining characters in Pulp Fiction.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Wladyslaw Szpilman.
items.explanation: Wladyslaw Szpilman is strongly linked to The Pianist.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie The Silence of the Lambs?
items.explanation: Clarice Starling is one of the defining characters in The Silence of the Lambs.

items.q: The character Jordan Belfort appears in The Wolf of Wall Street.
items.explanation: Jordan Belfort is a key character in The Wolf of Wall Street.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Monsieur Gustave.
items.explanation: Monsieur Gustave is strongly linked to The Grand Budapest Hotel.

items.q: The character Jamal Malik appears in Goodfellas.
items.explanation: Jamal Malik appears in Slumdog Millionaire, not Goodfellas.
